# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

Rails.application.config.session_store :cookie_store, key: '_your_app_session', serializer: :marshal, marshaler: Marshal

class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  before_action :load_session

  private

  def load_session
    if cookies[:session].present?
      session.merge!(Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])))
    end
  end

  def update_session
    cookies[:session] = Base64.encode64(Marshal.dump(session.to_hash))
  end

  after_action :update_session
end
